<!-- 
**Agent Overrides**
You can optionally override the default agent configuration by starting this description with the `/agent` command and flags. 
Flags must be on the very first line!
Example:
/agent --cli qwen --ollama --model qwen2.5-coder:14b

Available flags:
- `--cli <name>` : Choose the CLI to use (claude, qwen, antigravity)
- `--ollama` : Use local Ollama models instead of cloud APIs
- `--model <name>` : Specify the exact model name
-->

### Task Description
Please describe what you want the agent to do.
